MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description, or PAD for short, is a data set that is used by software authors to disseminate information to anyone interested in their software products. To find out more go to https://pad.asp-software.org/

Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: Removed the Waitress WSGI server from the desktop edition. The desktop app serves a single local, so it now uses Flask's built-in threaded server - this removes a dependency and simplifies installation and packaging across Snap, PPA, and the Windows installer.; Updated bleach from 6.3 to 6.4.; Updated cryptography from 46.0 to 48.0.; Updated msgpack from 1.0 to 1.2.; Updated pytest (dev) from 8.4 to 9.0.
Program_Info.Program_System_Requirements: Modern web browser; Linux (Snap, classic confinement) or Windows 10/11.

English.Keywords: training log, sport, fitness, running, cycling, swimming, activities, gear, TRIMP, health, privacy, self-hosted
English.Char_Desc_80: MyTraL: privacy-first sport training log - train smarter, not harder.
English.Char_Desc_250: MyTraL is a privacy-first personal sport training log. Track activities of any sport, gear usage, training load, goals, PRs, health, weight and trails. Import from FIT, GPX, TCX, Strava and Polar. Your data stays local - your log, your data, your edge.
English.Char_Desc_450: MyTraL (My Training Log) is a privacy-first, open-source personal sport training log for athletes who want full control over their data. Track activities of any sport, gear usage with statistics, training load, goals, personal records, health, weight, trails and outfits. Import recordings from FIT, GPX, TCX, Strava and Polar. Attach photos. Data is stored locally - no account, no telemetry. Your log, your data, your edge.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
MyTraL (My Training Log) is a privacy-first, open-source personal sport training log for athletes who value owning their data and want deeper insights and smarter progress.
Key features:
- Activity tracking for any sport - running, cycling, swimming, rowing and more. - Gear management with usage statistics so you know when to replace shoes or chains. - Training load analysis (TRIMP, CTL/ATL/TSB) and rich statistics. - Holistic tracking of goals, personal records, health, weight, trails and outfits. - Photo attachments and import from FIT, GPX, TCX, Strava, Polar and more. - AI coaching insights and year-over-year comparisons. - Local data storage - no account required, no telemetry, no lock-in.
MyTraL runs as a local desktop application (a Flask web app opened in your browser) on Linux and Windows, and is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0. Perfect for athletes who value privacy and want full control over their training history. Your log, your data, your edge.

Permissions.Distribution_Permissions: MyTraL is free and open-source software. You may freely distribute this PAD file and the unmodified MyTraL installation packages.
Permissions.EULA:
MyTraL is free software licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL) version 3 or, at your option, any later version.
This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU Affero General Public License for more details.
You should have received a copy of the GNU Affero General Public License along with this program. If not, see https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.html .
Full license text: https://github.com/dvorka-oss/mytral/blob/main/LICENSE
